name: Improper Handling of Extra Values
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when more values are provided than expected for a parameter, field, or argument. Excess values can lead to buffer overflows, unexpected state changes, or logic bypasses.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (user input, API parameters) flowing to TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes (buffer copy, data processing) without a CONTROL mediator (value count validation, bounds check) that enforces the expected number of values and rejects or truncates excess input safely.
